meta.name: CNC Machining Cost Calculator
meta.description: Industrial-grade cost estimation for CNC machining operations based on ISO 9001, Lean Manufacturing, and Six Sigma principles.

inputs.label: Material Type
inputs.businessContext: Material selection directly impacts tool wear, cutting speed, and cost per part.

businessContext_i18n.en: Material selection directly impacts tool wear, cutting speed, and cost per part.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Malzeme seçimi takım aşınmasını, kesme hızını ve parça başına maliyeti doğrudan etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Materialauswahl beeinflusst direkt Werkzeugverschleiß, Schnittgeschwindigkeit und Kosten pro Teil.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La sélection du matériau impacte directement l'usure de l'outil, la vitesse de coupe et le coût par pièce.
businessContext_i18n.es: La selección del material impacta directamente el desgaste de la herramienta, la velocidad de corte y el costo por pieza.

inputs.label: Part Weight (kg)
inputs.businessContext: Weight of the finished part, used to calculate raw material cost and scrap.

businessContext_i18n.en: Weight of the finished part, used to calculate raw material cost and scrap.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bitmiş parçanın ağırlığı, hammadde maliyeti ve fire hesaplamasında kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewicht des fertigen Teils, zur Berechnung von Rohmaterialkosten und Ausschuss.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids de la pièce finie, utilisé pour calculer le coût des matières premières et le rebut.
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso de la pieza terminada, utilizado para calcular el costo de materia prima y el desperdicio.

inputs.label: Stock Volume (cm³)
inputs.businessContext: Volume of raw material block before machining, determines material usage.

businessContext_i18n.en: Volume of raw material block before machining, determines material usage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Talaşlı imalat öncesi hammadde bloğunun hacmi, malzeme kullanımını belirler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Volumen des Rohmaterialblocks vor der Bearbeitung, bestimmt den Materialverbrauch.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Volume du bloc de matière avant usinage, détermine l'utilisation des matériaux.
businessContext_i18n.es: Volumen del bloque de materia prima antes del mecanizado, determina el uso de material.

inputs.label: Machining Time (minutes)
inputs.businessContext: Total cycle time per part including cutting, tool changes, and rapid moves.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total cycle time per part including cutting, tool changes, and rapid moves.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesme, takım değişimi ve hızlı hareketler dahil parça başına toplam çevrim süresi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzykluszeit pro Teil einschließlich Schneiden, Werkzeugwechsel und Eilgängen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps de cycle total par pièce incluant coupe, changements d'outils et déplacements rapides.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo total de ciclo por pieza, incluyendo corte, cambios de herramienta y movimientos rápidos.

inputs.label: Setup Time (minutes)
inputs.businessContext: Time to fixture, align, and program the machine for the batch.

businessContext_i18n.en: Time to fixture, align, and program the machine for the batch.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Parti için makinenin fikstürlenmesi, hizalanması ve programlanması süresi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zeit zum Spannen, Ausrichten und Programmieren der Maschine für die Charge.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps pour fixer, aligner et programmer la machine pour le lot.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo para fijar, alinear y programar la máquina para el lote.

inputs.label: Batch Size (parts)
inputs.businessContext: Number of identical parts produced in one production run.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of identical parts produced in one production run.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir üretim partisinde üretilen aynı parça sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl identischer Teile, die in einem Produktionslauf gefertigt werden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de pièces identiques produites en une seule série de production.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de piezas idénticas producidas en una ejecución de producción.

inputs.label: Machine Hourly Rate ($/hr)
inputs.businessContext: Fully burdened machine cost including depreciation, maintenance, and energy.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fully burdened machine cost including depreciation, maintenance, and energy.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Amortisman, bakım ve enerji dahil tam yüklü makine maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Voll belastete Maschinenkosten einschließlich Abschreibung, Wartung und Energie.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût machine complet incluant amortissement, maintenance et énergie.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo total de la máquina incluyendo depreciación, mantenimiento y energía.

inputs.label: Labor Hourly Rate ($/hr)
inputs.businessContext: Operator wage including overhead and benefits.

label_i18n.es: Tarifa horaria de mano de obra ($/h)

businessContext_i18n.en: Operator wage including overhead and benefits.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Genel giderler ve yan haklar dahil operatör ücreti.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Salaire de l'opérateur incluant frais généraux et avantages sociaux.
businessContext_i18n.es: Salario del operador incluyendo gastos generales y beneficios.

rules.message: Part weight, stock volume, and density must all be positive.
Batch size must be at least 1.
Machining time must be greater than 0.
Scrap rate must be between 0% and 50%.

thresholds.message: Scrap rate exceeds 10% — investigate process capability (Cp/Cpk).
Small batch size — setup cost per part may dominate.
Machine rate exceeds $200/hr — verify if high-precision or multi-axis.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
